import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s) s
  when None ""
  end
  let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut best = ""
  mut best_len = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = list.len(words)
  while i < n
    match list.get(words, i)
    when Some(w)
      let wl = string.len(w)
      if wl > best_len
        best = w
        best_len = wl
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("longest=#{best}")
  Ok(())
end
